effectEN: [ACT](RC):If one or less of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, COST  [[Rest] this unit], choose a unit card from your opponent's drop, and imprison it in your Prison.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you have a Set Order in your order zone, this unit gets "Intercept".
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit boosted, if two or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Preparations all okay~. You can turn into ash at any time.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, imprison it in your Prison, and Soul Charge (1) for each grade of that imprisoned card.
flavorTextEN: The more evil the stars, the fiercer the soul burns.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose one of your opponent's imprisoned unit cards in your Prison, and you may call it to your opponent's open (RC). If you called, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and imprison it in your Prison. (You choose the circle to call it)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if five or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, Counter Charge (1) or Soul Charge (3).
flavorTextEN: Suspicious people will be arrested! No need for hesitation!

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If one or less of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, COST  [[Rest] this unit], choose a unit card from your opponent's drop, and imprison it in your Prison.
flavorTextEN: Capturing devices meant for restraining gigantic enemies are kept inside as well.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your vanguard is attacked, COST  [retire this unit], choose one of your vanguards, and if your World is Dark Night, it gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. If it is Abyssal Dark Night instead of Dark Night, it gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: If there is a need, I shall throw my body out as well.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), look at three cards from the top of your deck , choose up to one World card from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[ACT](RC):If your vanguard is "Cardinal Deus, Orfist", COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], and call a Shadow Army token to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Fangs and claws gleam, producing a deeper shadow within the dark night.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks or boosts, if your World is Abyssal Dark Night, COST  [retire a Shadow Army token], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: The key to controlling the night battle is technology supremacy.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks or boosts, if your Order Zone has three or more Meteorites, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], Counter Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Gravidia. They are the ancient goddess from another planet.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), look at seven cards from the top of your deck, choose any number of Meteorite cards, reveal them and put them into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your vanguard is "Gravidia Nordlinger", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose up to two Meteorite cards from your hand, put them into your Order Zone, and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Not picky about the methods, as long as the results are achieved.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
[CONT]:You may have up to sixteen "Neatness Meteor Shower" in your deck.
[AUTO]:When this card is put into the Order Zone, you may Soul Charge (1). If it was put by your vanguard's ability, you may draw a card.
[AUTO]:When this card is put into your drop from the Order Zone, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: All who stand in the way of our ideals, shall be erased without a trace.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Discard a set order card from your hand], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: It sated its hunger for a bit. But immediately get hungry again.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you have a Set Order in your order zone, this unit gets "Intercept".
flavorTextEN: I know it's reckless! But the invasion must be stopped!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if you have a set order in your Order Zone, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Even if you cry and apologize, it's too late.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if you have a set order in your Order Zone, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Even if you cry and apologize, it's too late.

effectEN: [CONT](Hand):If your World is not Abyssal Dark Night, this card cannot be normal called. (Including (GC))
flavorTextEN: There is life that shine only in the deep darkness.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your Order Zone has three or more Meteorites, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], draw a card, choose up to one Meteorite card from your hand, and put it into your Order Zone.

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose one of your opponent's unit cards imprisoned in your Prison, and you may call it to your opponent's open (RC). If you called it, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and imprison it in your Prison. (You choose the circle to be called to)
flavorTextEN: Let's settle it with a bang!

effectEN: [CONT](GC):This unit gets [Shield]+5000 for every three Meteorite cards in your drop.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your Order Zone has a Set Order, Soul Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits, Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):If you have a vanguard with "Seraph" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if three or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, search your deck for up to one card with the same card name as this unit, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: I'm counting on you for this! I gotta rush to the next site!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your World is Dark Night, you may Soul Charge (1). If it is Abyssal Dark Night instead, you may Soul Charge (2).
[ACT](RC):If your World is Abyssal Dark Night, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], and call a Shadow Army token to (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a Shadow Army Token, call a Shadow Army Token to the (RC) this unit is on as [Rest].
[CONT](GC):If your vanguard is grade 4, this unit gets [Shield]+15000.
flavorTextEN: As long as we can handle it here! We'll be able to suppress them completely!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), look at three cards from the top of your deck , choose up to one World card from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[ACT](RC):If your vanguard is "Cardinal Deus, Orfist", COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], and call a Shadow Army token to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Fangs and claws gleam, producing a deeper shadow within the dark night.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your vanguard is attacked, COST  [retire this unit], choose one of your vanguards, and if your World is Dark Night, it gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. If it is Abyssal Dark Night instead of Dark Night, it gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: If there is a need, I shall throw my body out as well.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your Order Zone has a Set Order, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Even if you cry and beg, it is already too late.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your Order Zone has three or more Meteorites, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], draw a card, choose up to one Meteorite card from your hand, and put it into your Order Zone.
flavorTextEN: Let's make use of those that are beneficial to us.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):This unit gets [Shield]+5000 for every three Meteorite cards in your drop.
flavorTextEN: You'll not lay your hands...... On the paradise we built......

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits, Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: With a greater scale and force each time the act of aggression repeats.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a Shadow Army Token, call a Shadow Army Token to the (RC) this unit is on as [Rest].
flavorTextEN: A shadow. I'll become a shadow that thunders through the darkness.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+2000 for each set order in your order zone.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose up to one card other than trigger unit from your drop, and put it on the bottom of your deck. If a grade 3 or greater card was put, COST  [Soul Blast (3)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: An Afternoon Nap Regardless of Place, Eva
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed by riding from "One Who Craves Knowledge, Eva", search your deck for up to one Research card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: Mmmm.... Mmmm...

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your Order Zone has two or more cards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of battle. (includes your opponent's cards)
flavorTextEN: First aid, complete. Now, rise. Let us resume.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits, choose up to two Meteorite cards from your drop, and put them on the bottom of your deck in any order. If you put two cards, retire this unit, and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: To fulfill our purpose; that is the reason that we exist.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your Shadow Army token is retired from (RC) during your turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I don't forget my allies who have passed, since they become a part of my power.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a vanguard with "Seraph" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], your opponent chooses a trigger unit from their drop, and imprisons it in your Prison.
flavorTextEN: Fweet! Rule violations will not be tolerated!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+2000 for each of your Set Orders in your Order Zone.
flavorTextEN: With a love for civilization, the mischevious wings brings news of calamity.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose up to one non-trigger unit from your drop, and put it on the bottom of your deck. If you put a grade 3 or greater card, COST  [Soul Blast (3)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Diligently supporting those in the ring!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your Order Zone has a Set Order, Soul Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I'll roast you nice and slowly. So, stay still.

effectEN: All of this card's abilities are currently unknown.

[CONT](RC):If you have a vanguard attached  this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
[AUTO](Back Row RC):At the end of the battle your vanguard with "Silhouette " in its card name attacked a grade 3 or greater vanguard, if your front row has no rear-guards, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and [Stand] this unit.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If your World is Dark Night or Abyssal Dark Night, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and increase or decrease this unit's [Power] to 15000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), search your deck for up to one Base card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[CONT](RC):During the battle this unit boosted a unit with "Hero" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row Center RC):At the end of the battle your grade 3 vanguard with "Hero" in its card name attacked, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & [Rest] this unit], choose two of your rear-guards in the same column as each other, and exchange their positions.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: From here on is the Destination of the Experiment
effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
Play this if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Eva" in its card name!
[CONT](Order Zone):All of your rear-guards with "Obscudeid" in their card names cannot be retired by your opponent's card effects.
[ACT](Order Zone):If your order zone has four or more Research cards, COST  [put this card into your soul], Counter Charge (1), choose a card with "Obscudeid" in its card name from your drop zone, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: I will protect you. Just like you did.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a card with "B-Hero" in its card name from your drop, and scout it into your Base. (Scouted cards are put face up into your Order Zone)
flavorTextEN: The multipurpose patrols guides the citizens while scouting potential recruits!

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
Play this if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Eva" in its card name!
[CONT](Order Zone):All of your rear-guards with "Obscudeid" in their card names cannot be retired by your opponent's card effects.
[ACT](Order Zone):If your order zone has four or more Research cards, COST  [put this card into your soul], Counter Charge (1), choose a card with "Obscudeid" in its card name from your drop zone, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: I'll protect you. As you had protected me then.

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle. If your hand has two or more cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: To destroy the protective wall, firepower sufficient to break a star apart is necessary.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, search your deck or hand for up to one grade 1 Product card, put it into your order zone, and if you searched from your deck, shuffle your deck. If you put it from your hand, draw a card.

[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, search your deck or hand for up to one grade 1 Product card, put it into your order zone, and if you searched from your deck, shuffle your deck. If you put it from your hand, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: The cannon strike program had a lot of redundancy, so I rewrote it.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
Operate-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this card is operated, choose one of your opponent's front row rear-guards, and retire it. If you did not retire, draw a card, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: The state-of-the-art fixed artillery with unparalleled accuracy.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put a "Heavy Strike Cannon Fortress, Freischutz" from your Order Zone into your drop & retire this unit], choose up to one "Mobile Fortress of Obliteration, Freischutz Maximum" from your hand, and put it into your Order Zone.
flavorTextEN: OK! Tuning is perfect! Now, get out there and do your best!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your other rear-guard is retired during your opponent's turn, COST  [bind this unit], and put that retired card into your hand.
flavorTextEN: The peaceful night shall be protected, together with the resonating sounds of the earth.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your World is Dark Night, you may Soul Charge (1). If it is Abyssal Dark Night instead, you may Soul Charge (2).
[ACT](RC):If your World is Abyssal Dark Night, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], and call a Shadow Army token to (RC).
flavorTextEN:
(D-PR/154): From the darkness they come, and to the depths of the abyss, they return.
(D-PR/254): Shall we? To somewhere deeper, and darker.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: It adheres itself onto whatever it finds that catches its attention.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you did not operate a Product this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & [Rest] this unit], choose a Product card in your Order Zone, and operate it. (Activate its Operate ability)
flavorTextEN: This new weapon we made with Ms. Aurora is quite nice~!

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row Center RC):At the end of the battle your grade 3 vanguard with "Hero" in its card name attacked, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & [Rest] this unit], choose two of your rear-guards in the same column as each other, and swap their positions.
flavorTextEN: As expected, a chance to destroy the enemy! I'm counting on you to watch my back~!

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If your World is Dark Night or Abyssal Dark Night, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and increase or decrease this unit's [Power] to 15000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I'll shoot them all down. As long as enemies keep coming.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), search your deck for up to one Base card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[CONT](RC):During the battle this unit boosted a unit with "Hero" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: When choosing to create a base, it’s a given that bigger is better!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, if your vanguard is a grade 3 or greater [Glitter], COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and you may call this card to a back row (RC). If you called it, this unit cannot attack until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Slipping into the gambling room and snatching the best moment.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed by riding from "A Moment of Rest, Arkhite", search your deck for up to one Research card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
[AUTO]:When this card is put into the Order Zone, reveal the top five cards of your deck, choose up to two cards with "Monster" in their card names from among them, put one card from among them into your hand, put one card from among them into your drop, and shuffle your deck.
[ACT](Order Zone):COST  [[Rest] this card], choose up to one card with "Monster" in its card name from your drop, and put it into your Order Zone.
flavorTextEN: Explore, this is the call of the great earth.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a [Glitter] with "Eva" in its card name or a vanguard with "Arkhite" in its card name on your (VC), COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and draw a card.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your Order Zone has three or more Research cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Wom-wom-wom, it's the reception report.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), search your deck for up to one Base card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[CONT](RC):During the battle this unit boosted a unit with "B-Hero" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: When choosing to create a base, it’s a given that bigger is better!

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row Center RC):At the end of the battle your grade 3 vanguard with "B-Hero" in its card name attacked, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & [Rest] this unit], choose two of your rear-guards in the same column as each other, and swap their positions.
flavorTextEN: As expected, a chance to destroy the enemy! I'm counting on you to watch my back~!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your order zone has three or more different Set Orders, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The patrol security makes its rounds without rest, regardless of the time of the day.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), you may Soul Charge (1).
[ACT](RC):If your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [put this unit into soul], choose up to one grade 3 card with "Mikani" in its card name from your soul, and call it to (RC).
[Glitter]-"Kheios" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Kheios" in its card name)
[CONT](Soul):When you would count the number of different card names in your soul for your card's ability, all "Go Ahead, Mikani" in your soul each count as a different card name.
flavorTextEN: Complete annihilation, as per your orders.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If your order zone has two or more cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a vanguard with "Nordlinger" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from hand], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets "[CONT](VC):If no trigger units were put into your trigger zone this turn, this unit gets drive +1." until end of that battle. (If a trigger is revealed before the second drive check, the third drive check cannot be performed)
flavorTextEN: The power to reach out for your ideals, lies here.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Blue Deathster, "Skyenforcer" Stelvein", if your soul has "Blue Deathster, Sora Piriod", search your deck for up to one grade 1 Strategy card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck. If you did not reveal a card, you may call this card to (RC).

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your (RC) without any Dragontree markers, and put a Dragontree marker.

flavorTextEN: A monster's soul shines beautifully, even in the wilderness.

[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your (RC) without any Dragontree markers, and put a Dragontree marker.

flavorTextEN: A fallen spawn of the Dragontree. A cruel presenter of reality.

effectEN:
[CONT](GC):If you have a vanguard with "Messiah" in its card name, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
[AUTO](RC):When your other unit is unlocked, you may put this unit into your soul.
flavorTextEN: It is said that the Genesis Dragon, who once descended, painted the laws of the world and bestowed a new divine protection, "magic".

effectEN: [AUTO](RC) Generation Break 1 (Active if you have one or more face up G units in total on your (VC) or G zone):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, if you have a vanguard with "Messiah" in its card name, COST  [lock this unit], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. Then, if you have no face up cards in your damage zone, Counter Charge (1). (Locked cards cannot do anything. They are unlocked and turned face up as [Stand] at the end of their owner's turn)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](Hand):While you are paying the cost for Stride, this card may be discarded as a grade 3.
[ACT](Hand):If you have an "Alter Ego Messiah" crest, COST  [discard this card], search your deck or drop for up to one grade 3 card with "Messiah" in its card name, reveal it and put it into your hand, and if you searched your deck, shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your order zone has a grade 3 or greater set order, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Busy, busy.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
[AUTO]:When this card is put into the Order Zone, reveal the top five cards of your deck, choose up to two cards with "Monster" in their card names from among them, put one card from among them into your hand, put one card from among them into your drop, and shuffle your deck.
[ACT](Order Zone):COST  [[Rest] this card], choose up to one card with "Monster" in its card name from your drop, and put it into your Order Zone.
flavorTextEN: Explore, this is the call of the great earth.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a [Glitter] with "Eva" in its card name or a vanguard with "Arkhite" in its card name on your (VC), COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and draw a card.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your Order Zone has three or more Research cards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Wom-wom-wom, it's the reception report.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if your World is Abyssal Dark Night, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and call a Shadow Army token to a (RC) in the same column as this unit.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.
